basic_info.title: Final Fantasy XVI
basic_info.review: Final Fantasy XVI is a visually stunning action-RPG with innovative combat and mature storytelling. The PS5 Pro Game Boost version offers excellent performance, while the PC version provides superior graphics and extensive mod support.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーXVI (Final Fantasy Jūroku)
Final Fantasy XVI PS5 Pro Enhanced

play_today.details: The PS5 Pro Game Boost version offers significant performance improvements with up to 40% boost in some scenes. Digital Foundry confirmed this as the most polished console experience with stable frame rates and enhanced visuals.
The PC version offers superior graphics with HDR support and higher resolutions. The FFXVIFix mod is essential for ultrawide support, uncapped cutscene framerate, and adjustable FOV.

recommended_patches.name: FFXVIFix Mod
recommended_patches.description: Essential mod that adds ultrawide/narrower support, uncaps framerate in cutscenes, lets you adjust gameplay FOV and improves performance.

recommended_patches.name: RenoDX HDR Fix
recommended_patches.description: Enhances HDR support and visual quality for better color accuracy and brightness on PC displays.

recommended_patches.name: Cinematic Reshade Preset
recommended_patches.description: Makes the game look more cinematic with enhanced lighting, color grading, and visual effects.

recommended_patches.name: Unlimited Potions Mod
recommended_patches.description: Provides unlimited healing items for easier gameplay without resource management constraints.

play_today.details: Original console release with solid performance. Digital Foundry noted it's one of the most polished games on PS5, though lacks the enhancements of Pro version.

optimal_settings: Use Vulkan renderer for best compatibility

play_today.details: PC version with native DirectX 12 support. Requires powerful GPU for optimal performance at high settings.

description.synopsis: Clive Rosfield seeks revenge against the Empire that destroyed his homeland and brother, wielding the power of Eikons in a war-torn world called Valisthea.
key_features: Real-time action combat system with Eikon abilities
Open-world exploration with fast travel system
Multiple difficulty modes including Ultimaniac and FF mode
Stunning visuals powered by Luminous Engine
description.long_description: Final Fantasy XVI, developed and published by Square Enix under the direction of Hiroshi Takai, represents a bold departure from traditional Final Fantasy RPG mechanics. Released on PS5 in June 2023 and Windows in September 2024, the game features an action-oriented combat system where players control Clive Rosfield in real-time battles against Eikons (giant magical creatures). The Luminous Engine delivers breathtaking visuals with dynamic weather systems and detailed environments. Digital Foundry praised both versions as technically impressive, noting the PS5 Pro Game Boost provides significant performance improvements while the PC version offers superior graphics customization. The game received critical acclaim for its mature storytelling, character development, and innovative combat mechanics, though it divided some fans due to its departure from traditional turn-based RPG elements.
legacy_and_impact: Introduced real-time action combat to mainline Final Fantasy series
Featured groundbreaking Eikon battle system with unique abilities
Set new visual standards for PlayStation 5 exclusives
Demonstrated successful console-to-PC port with enhanced features
Part of the Final Fantasy legacy while establishing new franchise direction
